name: kyc-screener
description: Parses onboarding docs, runs the rules engine, flags gaps.

workflow.name: parse_docs
workflow.action: Extract fields from uploaded onboarding documents.

workflow.name: run_rules
workflow.action: Evaluate against KYC/AML rules grid and sanctions lists.

workflow.name: escalate
workflow.action: Flag gaps, generate escalation report with remediation steps.
